column7: {"nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"rvdwz752","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"I designed an immersive horror experience where the player explores an abandoned factory through the lens of a live stream. My goal was to merge industrial realism with a claustrophobic 'Found Footage' aesthetic, centered on three technical pillars :","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"ex4ur779","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"BULLETED_LIST","id":"yrfa5754","nodes":[{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"rev71755","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"cy900756","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Blueprint-Driven Level Design :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Engineered a realistic industrial environment inspired by authentic historical brewery floor plans. I implemented a modular ","decorations":[]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"sub-level system","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" in Unreal Engine to optimize the technical workflow and ensure a clean, scalable project structure for the art team.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"a35xj794","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"z9tft761","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"nslda762","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Kinetic 3C & Motor Latency :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Developed a custom camera system to simulate the 'Found Footage' look. I engineered a unique kinetic effect simulating motor latency to mimic the physical weight of the head, intentionally slowing response times to heighten player stress and vulnerability.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"1kzgi816","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"x12s1765","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"qayxz766","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Atmospheric Environmental Storytelling :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Focused on transforming a derelict space into a threatening narrative tool. By combining authentic architectural layouts with calculated lighting and camera feedback, I created a high-tension atmosphere that bridges the gap between reality and nightmare.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]}],"bulletedListData":{"indentation":0}}],"documentStyle":{}}

column6: 1-Week Team Workshop as Game Designer / Level Designer
column7: {"nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"zhgk8247","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"During this week collaboration, I served as the bridge between design and code. My goal was to create a highly responsive jetpack system by defining clear technical requirements for the programming team while ensuring a polished player experience :","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"60tkr304","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"BULLETED_LIST","id":"6eoap249","nodes":[{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"jfspq250","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"ms4qk251","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"3C Design :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Engineered the Character, Controls, and Camera by providing programmers with precise logic and variables. I focused on iterative tuning to ensure the input-to-action loop felt fluid and immediate.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"qxu08317","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"ooyef254","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"pqgqi255","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Systems Architecture & Tuning :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Designed the jetpack’s propulsion physics and fuel mechanics. I collaborated closely with programmers to implement custom parameters, for thrust, gravity, and drag to achieve the perfect \"game feel\".","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"a6w1o339","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"8ji3i258","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"o8m8m259","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Onboarding & Level Design :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Authored level segments specifically designed to teach the player the jetpack’s mechanics and limitations. I mapped out obstacle patterns that gradually introduce complexity as the player masters the controls.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"zebau361","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"q5sl5262","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"1yhka263","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Visual Feedback & UI/UX :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Managed the complete feedback loop, including dynamic FX and a visual fuel gauge. I ensured that every system change (such as fuel depletion or thrust activation) was clearly communicated to the player through intuitive visual cues.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]}],"bulletedListData":{"indentation":0}}],"documentStyle":{}}

{"nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"fsfxq361","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"For this remake, I focused on translating a 2D cinematic classic into a modern 3D experience. My goal was to preserve the original intent of Eric Chahi while modernizing the gameplay flow through three core pillars :","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"r9kuz398","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"BULLETED_LIST","id":"4dug3363","nodes":[{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"vfwyw364","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"b255w365","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"3D Character & 3C Adaptation :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Re-engineered the original 2D movement logic into a functional 3D system. I adapted the character's weight and agility to ensure the controls felt modern while staying faithful to the deliberate, cinematic feel of the source material.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"maxo1409","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"sh09s368","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"1egn4369","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Progression & GPE Design :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Authored a series of Gameplay Elements (GPEs) to introduce mechanical variety. I designed a rhythmic difficulty curve where environmental challenges and enemy encounters scale in complexity as the player progresses.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}},{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"u2hvm427","nodes":[],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]},{"type":"LIST_ITEM","id":"djw87372","nodes":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","id":"0pyco373","nodes":[{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":"Cinematic Guidance & Level Flow :","decorations":[{"type":"BOLD","fontWeightValue":700}]}},{"type":"TEXT","id":"","nodes":[],"textData":{"text":" Directed in-game cinematics that serve as environmental signposting. Each sequence was crafted to clarify player objectives and orient the player within the 3D space, maintaining the seamless immersion of the original game.","decorations":[]}}],"paragraphData":{"textStyle":{"textAlignment":"AUTO"}}}]}],"bulletedListData":{"indentation":0}}],"documentStyle":{}}
